wins.event: Q3 revenue $16B record, +22% YoY; EBITDA $10.7B record (+30%); backlog record $110B
AI revenue $5.2B (+63% YoY); 10 consecutive quarters of growth; XPUs now 65% of AI revenue
New qualified XPU customer with >$10B in production orders for AI racks (likely OpenAI)
2026 AI revenue outlook 'improves significantly' vs prior; Q4 AI guide $6.2B (+66% YoY)
Tomahawk 6 (102 Tbps) and Jericho4 launched; VMware VCF 9.0 released

risks.event: Non-AI semi $4B flat sequentially; recovery slow with enterprise networking and server storage declining
Customer concentration: $10B+ orders from single new XPU customer increases concentration risk
Q4 enterprise networking expected to remain down sequentially

guidance.notes: Q4 guide $17.4B (+24% YoY); EBITDA 67%. 2026 AI revenue outlook raised significantly on new $10B XPU customer order. 10th consecutive AI growth quarter.

_notes: Backlog $110B and new $10B XPU customer disclosure are the headlines. CEO at peak conviction. Customer count: 3 production + 1 newly qualified + 3 still in development.
